title: chrysophyllum psilophyllum
intro: Chrysophyllum psilophyllum, also known as the White Sapote or Velvet Apple, is a species of evergreen tree native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chrysophyllum psilophyllum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions and wounds.
